nasb.text: But ships shall come from the coast of Kittim, And they shall afflict Asshur and will afflict Eber; So they also will come to destruction.”

esv.text: But ships shall come from Kittim and shall afflict Asshur and Eber; and he too shall come to utter destruction.”

cnv.text: 必有船從基提而來， 苦害亞述，苦害希伯； 他卻要滅亡。”

ccb.text: 船只从基提驶来， 征服亚述和希伯， 但他也要灭亡。”
